s1.speaker: poppy
s1.line: There was one thing I keep thinking about. An envelope, on top. The wax was green, and the seal was — a lantern? Wrapped in leaves. Ivy, maybe. It was beautiful. It looked... important on purpose.

s2.speaker: gary
s2.line: Hold that thought — exactly that thought. Let me get it down while it's still in your voice.
